text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ☆ That was a really impressive win,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This plushie feels sooo good. It's all soft and
fluffy... Just like a pancake!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think I'll make pancakes for my afternoon
snack today. ♪ I'm going to make a full stack!
